description.value:
You've been trained in a traditional orc combat style called the Broken Hand Technique. The style originates from a tale that claims the orc who invented it was said to have driven off an invasion with two broken hands. This fighting style emphasizes close-quarters combat, grappling, trips, and pins, and uses the knees, elbows, feet, and shoulders to maneuver the enemy into a more advantageous position regardless of their size.

You become trained in Athletics. If you would automatically become trained in Athletics (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Titan Wrestler] skill feat.
